name: get_pricing
description: Return current pricing for the Mink Viking Experience including per-person rates, print pricing, gift card validity, and what is included in every session. Rates are live from the shop's multi-currency exchange-rate cache (WCML).

name: get_business_info
description: Return business operating hours, full street address, GPS coordinates, phone, email, and booking policy for Mink Viking Experience in Reykjavik.

name: get_booking_url
description: Generate a pre-filled booking URL that opens mink.is/booknow with the date and participant count already selected. Use this as the final step in a booking conversation to hand the visitor off to checkout.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: check_availability, get_business_info, get_booking_url · Public sink: get_business_info · Destructive: check_availability.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: check_availability, get_business_info, get_booking_url · Public sink: get_business_info · Destructive: check_availability

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
